'''âf-k-m''' ('''kafakam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhyme|rhyme]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhyme|rhyme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-k-m
|-
! Lemma
| kafakam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifakam|thifakam]] || [[word:jifakam|jifakam]] || [[word:shifakam|shifakam]] || [[word:kifakam|kifakam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufakam|thuthufakam]] || [[word:jujufakam|jujufakam]] || [[word:shushufakam|shushufakam]] || [[word:kukufakam|kukufakam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufakam|thufakam]] || [[word:jufakam|jufakam]] || [[word:shufakam|shufakam]] || [[word:kufakam|kufakam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufakam|thufakam]] || [[word:jufakam|jufakam]] || [[word:shufakam|shufakam]] || [[word:kufakam|kufakam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefakam|thefakam]] || [[word:jefakam|jefakam]] || [[word:shefakam|shefakam]] || [[word:kefakam|kefakam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofakam|thothofakam]] || [[word:jojofakam|jojofakam]] || [[word:shoshofakam|shoshofakam]] || [[word:kokofakam|kokofakam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofakam|thofakam]] || [[word:jofakam|jofakam]] || [[word:shofakam|shofakam]] || [[word:kofakam|kofakam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofakam|thofakam]] || [[word:jofakam|jofakam]] || [[word:shofakam|shofakam]] || [[word:kofakam|kofakam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfakam|thĂŠfakam]] || [[word:jĂŠfakam|jĂŠfakam]] || [[word:shĂŠfakam|shĂŠfakam]] || [[word:kĂŠfakam|kĂŠfakam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafakam|thathafakam]] || [[word:jajafakam|jajafakam]] || [[word:shashafakam|shashafakam]] || [[word:kakafakam|kakafakam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafakam|thafakam]] || [[word:jafakam|jafakam]] || [[word:shafakam|shafakam]] || [[word:kafakam|kafakam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafakam|thafakam]] || [[word:jafakam|jafakam]] || [[word:shafakam|shafakam]] || [[word:kafakam|kafakam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafakam|shafakam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafakam|goshafakam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafakam|gokishafakam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafakamnĂŒ|shafakamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafakamnknĂŒ|goshafakamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakamnĂŒ|gokishafakamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafakamshĂ«|shafakamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafakamnkshĂ«|goshafakamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafakamshĂ«|gokishafakamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakamro|shafakamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakamnkro|goshafakamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakamro|gokishafakamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakamu|shafakamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakamnkmu|goshafakamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakamu|gokishafakamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafakamsher|shafakamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafakamnksher|goshafakamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafakamsher|gokishafakamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafakamng|shafakamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafakamnkng|goshafakamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafakamng|gokishafakamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafakamya|shafakamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafakamnkya|goshafakamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafakamya|gokishafakamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafakamyam|shafakamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafakamnkyam|goshafakamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafakamyam|gokishafakamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafakamnĂŒshĂ«|shafakamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafakamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafakamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafakamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafakamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakamnĂŒro|shafakamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakamnknĂŒro|goshafakamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakamnĂŒro|gokishafakamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakamnĂŒmu|shafakamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakamnknĂŒmu|goshafakamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakamnĂŒmu|gokishafakamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafakamshĂ«nĂŒ|shafakamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafakamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafakamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafakamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakamshĂ«ro|shafakamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakamnkshĂ«ro|goshafakamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakamshĂ«ro|gokishafakamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakamshĂ«mu|shafakamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakamnkshĂ«mu|goshafakamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakamshĂ«mu|gokishafakamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafakamronĂŒ|shafakamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafakamnkronĂŒ|goshafakamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakamronĂŒ|gokishafakamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafakamroshĂ«|shafakamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafakamnkroshĂ«|goshafakamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafakamroshĂ«|gokishafakamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakamromu|shafakamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakamnkromu|goshafakamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakamromu|gokishafakamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafakamunĂŒ|shafakamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafakamnkmunĂŒ|goshafakamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakamunĂŒ|gokishafakamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafakamushĂ«|shafakamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafakamnkmushĂ«|goshafakamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafakamushĂ«|gokishafakamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakamuro|shafakamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakamnkmuro|goshafakamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakamuro|gokishafakamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
